heading: Release from wilderness study area status
label: 460nnn–92 Release from wilderness study area status
text: The Federal lands included in the Wildlands Juniper Management Area established under are no longer subject to the requirement of pertaining to managing the lands so as not to impair the suitability of the lands for preservation as wilderness.section 460nnn–91 of this titlesection 1782(c) of title 43
